productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Galaxy Elite White Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those want a stylish running shoe without sacrificing support and performance.  Wear this Galaxy Elite shoe from adidas when you're playing active Sports for the best results from your feet.UpperAdiTuff suede upper for maximum flexibility, durability and styleadidas Patented 3-Stripes in green on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and visibility Padded collar and tongue and fabric inner for all-day snug comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitSoft footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for long lasting cushioning and support OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with flex grooves for absolute grip in all kinds of weatherShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
